voice_lines.line: Move. Now. Do not look back — just run. The ground shakes because something massive is behind you. Your legs know what your mind has not yet accepted. Run.
voice_lines.trigger: T-Rex or large predator enters chase state toward player

voice_lines.line: The herd moves at dusk. Forty, maybe fifty animals — all heading north toward the river delta. When they pass, you do not move. You do not breathe. You become part of the ground beneath them.
voice_lines.trigger: Player first observes large herbivore herd migration event

campfire.name: Campfire Crackle 3

next_agent_handoff.vfx_sync_request: Attach Niagara fire particle system to AmbientSound_Campfire_Hub_001 location (X=2100, Y=2400, Z=80). Attach water splash/mist Niagara to AmbientSound_River_Hub_001 (X=2600, Y=2800, Z=80). Audio zones are TriggerBox actors — VFX can use same zones for particle activation triggers.
